evidence.snippet: We design and make in-flight variable pitch propellers for Ultra Lights and UAV. Blades are in carbon fiber and are made by the most advanced technology
More recently we faced the UAV application, where we developed with great success a in-flight variable pitch propeller for Wankel engines

items.notes: Company designs and manufactures in-flight variable pitch propeller hubs and blades for Ultra Light aircraft and UAVs. Also resells ground adjustable and fixed pitch propellers from Sensenich, Catto, Warp Drive, Whirl Wind.

evidence.snippet:
TBO of the Hub is 2000 hours.
Blade life is depending from the composite material type and is specified by blades maker

In 1999 we developed and presented to the “Bassano” meeting the first in-flight variable pitch for Ultra Light in Italy.
Today, after long and methodical testing of our propellers on different aircrafts, we confirm the top reliability and extremely long life of our hubs and blades.

readiness.notes: Catalog SKUs listed (VPH3-BE, VPH5-TE, VPH6-TE, VPH6-TH), TBO of 2000 hours specified, active dealer/installer network across multiple countries.

tagline: Manufactures electrically and hydraulically actuated variable-pitch propeller hubs (VPH series) and constant-speed governors for ultralight aircraft and UAVs, with carbon-fiber blades and 2,000-hour TBO on hubs. Also stocks ground-adjustable and fixed-pitch propellers as authorized dealer. NDAA and Blue UAS compliance status unknown; public evidence limited to product specs and aircraft integrations.
